rewritten_requirements: The system shall check if everything is working upon power-on.
The system shall stop if there is a problem during startup.
The system shall become ready to use if everything is fine during startup.
The system shall allow the user to reset it when it is ready to use.
The system shall allow the user to activate it when it is ready to use.
The system shall allow the user to turn it off when it is ready to use.
The system shall start monitoring if it is activated.
The system shall start the alarm and send alerts if a sensor is triggered during monitoring.
The system shall continue monitoring if it turns out to be a false alarm or the time ends.
The system shall stop and return to normal when the user enters the password at any time.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system checks if everything is working when powered on.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The system starts when the power is turned on and checks if everything is working.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If there is a problem during startup, the system stops.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If there is a problem, it stops.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If everything is fine during startup, the system becomes ready to use.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If everything is fine, it becomes ready to use.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When the system is ready to use, the user can reset it.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When it is ready to use, the user can reset it, activate it, or turn it off.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When the system is ready to use, the user can activate it.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When it is ready to use, the user can reset it, activate it, or turn it off.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When the system is ready to use, the user can turn it off.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When it is ready to use, the user can reset it, activate it, or turn it off.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the system is activated, it starts monitoring.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If activated, the system starts monitoring.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If a sensor is triggered while monitoring, the alarm starts and alerts are sent.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If a sensor is triggered, the alarm starts and alerts are sent.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If it turns out to be a false alarm or the time ends, the system continues monitoring.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it turns out to be a false alarm or the time ends, it continues monitoring.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: At any time, the user can enter the password to stop the system and bring it back to normal.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At any time, the user can enter the password to stop it and bring it back to normal.
